title: Dark Brotherhood Personalities
tagline: Distinct personalities and deep lore for every Dark Brotherhood member.
description:
## Overview

A comprehensive personality overhaul for every Dark Brotherhood member. Each assassin now has a **distinct voice**, backstory knowledge, and reaction patterns.

## What's Included

- Unique personality prompts for **Astrid**, **Cicero**, **Nazir**, **Festus**, **Gabriella**, and **Veezara**
- Cicero's dialogue is properly unhinged with references to the Night Mother
- Knowledge packs covering DB lore, contracts, and internal politics
- Triggers for quest-specific reactions during the DB questline

## Compatibility

Works with vanilla Skyrim and most NPC overhaul mods. Requires SkyrimNet `0.19+`.

> *"Sweet mother, sweet mother, send your child unto me..."*
author: vex
